msg: warning: Variable p is used uninitialized!
reasoning: Same file and same uninitialized variable 'p' issue as FAMILY_4, but at line 27 inside case 'R'. When CONFIG_FEATURE_HDPARM_HDIO_SCAN_HWIF is defined, case 'R' exists in the switch. When case 'R' is entered, case 'W' is never executed, so 'p' (declared as 'char *p;' without initialization) is uninitialized at line 27 (if(!p)). This is a genuine uninitialized variable use. The presence condition [def(CONFIG_FEATURE_HDPARM_HDIO_SCAN_HWIF)] is correctly constrained. The vbdb entry for 061fd0a only documents the UndefinedSymbol bug; this uninitialized_value bug at case 'R' is a new finding.
